artists.name: Forward Kwenda
artists.style_notes: Meditative, precise, deep theory. Primary artist for mbiramagic.com. Prefers 'Yepasi' naming for ancient Nhemamusasa version. Plays Tadzungaira in multiple tunings.

artists.name: Musekiwa Chingodza
artists.style_notes: Lyrical, marimba-influenced, fluid. Active collaborator (Third Coast Percussion, 2025).

artists.name: Garikayi Tirikoti
artists.style_notes: Rhythmically dense. Instrument maker. Inventor of the mbira orchestra concept (multiple tunings stacked simultaneously).

artists.name: Nyamasvisva (Mawungira eNharira)
artists.style_notes: Ceremonial, multi-progression, traditional ensemble lead. Plays Tadzungaira in many different progressions.

artists.name: Chris Berry
artists.style_notes: Grammy winner. Fusion/cross-cultural. Groove-forward. Most accessible entry point for non-traditional listeners.

artists.name: Mudavanhu Magaya
artists.style_notes: Primary mbira.online instructor. Deep bangidza lessons. Multi-tuning. Nhemamusasa Yepasi/Yekutanga specialist.

artists.name: Tute Chigamba
artists.style_notes: Traditional base. mbira.online instructor. Bangidza in Gandanga tuning.

artists.name: Mbira DzeNharira
artists.style_notes: Most commercially documented ensemble. 11 CDs, 3 DVDs. Most-streamed mbira artist (6.3K monthly Spotify listeners).
